overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a heavy rainstorm in an urban Los Santos environment. The player character walks along a canal-side path before turning into an open parking lot with the city skyline visible through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal-side pedestrian walkway with continuous hedge barrier

events.description: reaching the end of the canal path and approaching the open parking area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk beside a canal, passing benches and trash cans

entered.detail: murky waterway running parallel to the walkway, visible through chain-link fencing
black metal fence separating the sidewalk from the canal water
dense green hedge wall in a concrete planter blocking the view to the left
tall palm trees visible through the rain at the end of the path
multi-story glass and concrete building partially obscured by the hedge
simple concrete seating along the hedge wall
tall modern street lamps lining the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow canal-side path during a heavy rainstorm. A tall hedge lines the left side while a chain-link fence separates the walkway from the water on the right. Palm trees and modern buildings are visible through the rain at the path's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: open parking lot with grass medians and red curbs

events.description: turning right from the canal path into the open parking lot area
passing parked vehicles including a red sedan and dark-colored car

agents.ego_description: turning into and walking through the wet parking lot toward the distant city buildings

notable_agents.action: red sedan parked stationary in the lot near the hotel entrance

entered.detail: wet black asphalt surface with large rain puddles reflecting the sky
raised grass islands with bright red painted concrete curbs
large multi-story hotel with grid-patterned windows and illuminated entrance
stationary vehicles including a red sedan and dark car
elevated highway or monorail structure visible through the rain haze
tall downtown towers barely visible through the heavy rain and fog

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide parking lot with wet asphalt reflecting the stormy sky. A large hotel building rises on the left while distant skyscrapers loom through the haze. The camera passes parked cars and grass medians with red curbs, continuing through the rain-soaked urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined canal-side walkway into a vast, rain-drenched urban parking lot. It begins by navigating a narrow path flanked by a tall hedge and a chain-link fence, with palm trees and modern architecture appearing through the heavy downpour ahead. As the camera reaches the end of the walkway, the scene opens into a wide expanse of wet asphalt that reflects the stormy sky. The perspective then glides past parked cars and red-curbed grass medians, shifting from the enclosed path to an open landscape dominated by a large hotel and distant skyscrapers looming through the haze.
